description: 3-column testimonial cards with quote, author name, role, and avatar.

fields.name: Subheading
fields.default: Don't just take our word for it — hear from some of our customers.

fields.name: Quote
fields.default: This product changed everything for us.

default.Quote: We rebuilt our entire marketing site in a weekend. The templates are gorgeous and the editor is incredibly intuitive. Our conversion rate jumped 40%.
default.Name: Sarah Chen

default.Quote: As a solo founder, I needed something fast and professional. This delivered both. I went from idea to live site in under three hours.
default.Name: Marcus Rivera

default.Quote: The collaboration features are what sold us. Our design and content teams work together seamlessly now. No more handoff headaches.
default.Name: Emily Park
